name: Brunch Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown and drain the sausage.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, dry mustard, and salt until well combined.
3. Add the cubed white bread to the egg mixture and stir to coat evenly.
4. Fold in the grated cheddar cheese and crumbled sausage.
5. Grease a 9x13 inch baking pan and pour the mixture into it.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for 1 hour, or until set and lightly browned on top. Test with a knife to ensure the center is cooked through.
Optional: You can add sliced mushrooms and diced peppers, or you may omit the sausage entirely.
